category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

target_market_label.en: Bosnia and Herzegovina (BAS / DERK / NOS BiH)
target_market_label.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那（BAS / DERK / NOS BiH）
target_market_label.zht: 波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那（BAS / DERK / NOS BiH）

title.en: China-to-Bosnia and Herzegovina EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Bosnia and Herzegovina CE-aligned expectations, EN/IEC 61851 technical evidence, DERK charging-service governance expectations, grid project acceptance by NOS BiH, connector interoperability, OCPP, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那 CE 对齐要求、EN/IEC 61851 技术证据、DERK 充电服务治理预期、NOS BiH 电网项目验收、接口互操作性、OCPP 以及安全/EMC证据之间的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那 CE 對齊要求、EN/IEC 61851 技術證據、DERK 充電服務治理預期、NOS BiH 電網專案驗收、介面互操作性、OCPP 以及安全/EMC證據之間的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, DERK market interpretation, charging service licensing assessment, grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current Bosnia and Herzegovina CE, DERK, NOS BiH, and grid requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、DERK市场解释、充电服务许可评审、并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前应与合格波斯尼亚专业人士核验现行CE、DERK、NOS BiH及电网要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE適用範圍裁定、DERK市場解釋、充電服務許可評審、並網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運商和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前應與合格波斯尼亞專業人士核驗現行CE、DERK、NOS BiH及電網要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Bosnia and Herzegovina, practical gaps are CE technical-file and declaration work for in-scope EU-aligned legislation, EN/IEC 61851 technical alignment, Type 2 / CCS2 interface migration where required by buyer, operator, or fleet profile, DERK charging-service licensing for public operation, grid project review by NOS BiH, OCPP backend interoperability, and EMC / residual-current protection evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那时，主要实际差距包括适用欧盟协调产品法规下的CE技术文件与符合性声明、EN/IEC 61851技术对应、按买方/运营方/车队要求执行Type 2或CCS2接口、公共运营所需DERK充电服务许可、NOS BiH电网项目审查、OCPP后台互操作、EMC与剩余电流保护证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那時，主要實際差距包括適用歐盟協調產品法規下的CE技術文件與符合性聲明、EN/IEC 61851技術對應、按買方/營運方/車隊要求執行Type 2或CCS2接口、公共營運所需DERK充電服務許可、NOS BiH電網專案審查、OCPP後台互操作，以及EMC與剩餘電流保護證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
